name: torture-chamber
summary: A room built to inflict and extract — implements of pain arrayed around a central station, drains and stains in the floor.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangular, room for tools along walls and a working floor

accent.purpose: bloodstain / drain channel under the rack

primary_palette.note: classic inquisition — rack centered, fire to either side
this chamber ends lives, it doesn't extract
clinical torture — a chair and a tray of instruments
a professional's workshop — multiple stations, each ready

story_prompts: recently used — coals still warm, a half-completed confession on the table
abandoned inquisition cell, implements rusted to the walls
infernal torture chamber where the victim is the room itself
cultist's altar-chamber: torture is offering, not interrogation
a tidy executioner's room — professional, uncruel, worse for it
anti_patterns: don't make it pretty — avoid carpets, chandeliers, fine furniture
don't put the centerpiece against a wall — working space is needed on all sides
avoid bright uniform lighting — pools of firelight read grimmer than a lit room
